input.input: Search official OpenAI Agents SDK docs (and authoritative GitHub repo or changelogs) to find how to show "reasoning tokens" (token-level chain-of-thought / internal reasoning) in a UI when using the OpenAI Agents SDK. Produce a concise how-to (<=200 words) saved to /_outputs/openai_agents_reasoning_ui.md. Include: 1) the exact flag/parameter(s) or method to enable token-level reasoning output (or trace) in the SDK, 2) a minimal client-side code snippet (JavaScript or Python) that shows how to stream or capture the reasoning tokens and forward them to a UI, and 3) one reliable source URL (official docs or repo). Keep it short and actionable — do not include extra commentary. Return only the output path(s) and a one-line summary in your tool response.

output:
/_outputs/openai_agents_reasoning_ui.md

Concise how-to saved (shows ModelSettings.reasoning, include=["reasoning.encrypted_content"], streaming events response.reasoning_text.delta; minimal Python streaming snippet).
